infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AuraJournal uses your location to show live weather, detect activities like walking, running, and improve your timeline automatically.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: AuraJournal uses background location to detect meaningful activities and suggest timeline entries even when the app is not open.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow AuraJournal to access your location to show live weather and intelligent geofenced suggestions.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow AuraJournal to access your location always to detect stays and suggest timeline activities behind the scenes.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow AuraJournal to access your location always to detect stays and suggest timeline activities behind the scenes.
